02 / FEATURED CAMPAIGNS

Campaigns with real outcomes

End-to-end brand campaigns where I owned strategy, scripting, storyboarding, creative direction, and execution.

🏆 Commward 2025 Bronze B2B Category Managerium

"১৬ টাকা থেকে ১৬ হাজার কোটি টাকা"

An end-to-end B2B campaign for Managerium (AKIJ iBOS), developed in direct collaboration with Shuvasish Bhowmick. I handled the full pipeline — market research, scripting, storyboarding, creative direction, and campaign execution. Recognized by Commward 2025 as one of Bangladesh's outstanding B2B marketing campaigns.

Campaign · 27.9K+ reactions ▶ Watch reel
⭐ Flagship — ATL & BTL illusion Arc · Gaming Qurbani Run

illusion Arc — Qurbani Run 360° Campaign

illusion Arc is Bangladesh's biggest gaming platform, where I lead branding and promotional work across titles including Salami Rush, Qurbani Run, and World Cup Goal Master 2026. For the Qurbani Run launch I ran a full ATL + BTL campaign — Theme Song, Promo Videos, Static Posts, and Gaming Streaming content online, plus Banners, Posters, Leaflets, on-ground Events, a Press Briefing, and a Prize Giving Ceremony offline.

08 / EXPERIENCE

Roles & where I've worked

Full-time and part-time roles across brand, campaign, and sports marketing since 2024.

Jun 2025 — PresentDhaka, Bangladesh

Executive — Brand & Communications

AKIJ iBOS — AKIJ Resource

Independently lead end-to-end brand and marketing communications across AKIJ iBOS's core products — Managerium (flagship ERP software), PeopleDesk (HRM software), and Prime VAT (VAT management software) — covering market research, competitor gap analysis, campaign strategy, content creation, and creative direction. Spearheaded the Commward 2025 Bronze-winning B2B campaign, and lead branding & ATL/BTL promotions for the illusion Arc gaming platform (Qurbani Run, Salami Rush, World Cup Goal Master 2026).

Created and managed 700+ content assets — statics, video scripts, and website content — with roughly 70% driving promotion for AKIJ iBOS products: Managerium (flagship ERP), PeopleDesk (HRM), and Prime VAT (VAT management). One particular piece for Travilo generated 200+ qualified leads, demonstrating strong content-marketing impact.
Managed post-production coordination and client servicing for Sky Buy BD, AKIJ Telecom, and BrainForward — client-servicing projects valued at over BDT 30,00,000. Also supported client servicing and project coordination for Moharani Grocery, ORCA, Carnival Casino, Faria's Agro Essence, and other brands under the AKIJ iBOS portfolio — ensuring smooth execution and timely delivery.
